CustomObject.description: The Auris Child Form Mapping metadata ensures that nested JSON structures (child objects/arrays) from Auris are dynamically processed without modifying code. When the system receives a JSON payload from Auris, it looks for child nodes (e.g., academicResults, education, siblings). For each child node, the system checks this metadata: Matches Department__c and TypeOfForm__c. Finds the JSONKey__c (e.g., academicResults). Retrieves the Label field value (e.g., insertAcademicResults). The corresponding Apex method (with the same name as in Label) is then called to process and insert child records.
CustomObject.label: Auris Child Form Mapping
